original:
哲学家(01:00:21): As you have leader, I think you have this tenacious side, which is can be.It can be an advantage.You can make you a bit richer.But yeah, so what I would propose to you is to to do this.These.That's why I proposed to you.Actually, I don't propose it to everybody, because some people I know they will not be interested to try to do these.

哲学家(01:00:41): These sessions.It's ten sessions.And each time you have work to do beforehand that you work with someone and we'll work it with you.Yes.
translation:
哲学家(01:00:21): 既然你有领导力，我认为你具备这种坚韧的特质，这可以成为一种优势，能让你变得更丰富些。所以，我建议你尝试这些练习——这也是我向你提议的原因。实际上，我并非对每个人都提出这个建议，因为我知道有些人可能对尝试这些并不感兴趣。

哲学家(01:00:41): 这些课程共十次，每次课前都需要你与他人协作完成准备工作，我们会全程指导你。是的。
